name: Settings
purpose: App preferences + small state (currency, FY start, residence, estate check-in, patron grants, device id).

fields.name: value
fields.purpose: App preferences include residence and estate check-in state.

name: VaultEntries
purpose: Friendly labels + Stronghold record pointers for stored credentials (ciphertext lives in the per-app Stronghold vault, never here).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: stronghold_key
fields.description: Stronghold record key (pointer, not a secret)

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: Accounts
purpose: Financial accounts the user tracks net worth across (banks, deposits, investments, loans).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: contact
fields.purpose: Emergency contact so family can act on this account.

fields.name: emergency_action
fields.purpose: What family should do for this account in an emergency.

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: MonthlySnapshots
purpose: One balance per (account, month) — the net-worth time series.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

name: Goals
purpose: Savings goals with target amount/date and ETA projection.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: account_filter
fields.description: JSON list of account ids contributing

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: TaxYears
purpose: One row per assessment year: chosen ITR form and import metadata.

name: TaxIncome
purpose: Income line items per assessment year (salary, house property, capital gains, …).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: amount
fields.purpose: The user's income detail, kept to compute and review tax.

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: TaxDeductions
purpose: Deduction line items per assessment year (80C, 80D, …).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: amount
fields.purpose: The user's deduction detail, kept to compute and review tax.

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: TaxPayments
purpose: Tax payments per assessment year (TDS, advance, self-assessment).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: payer_name
fields.purpose: Identify the deductor on a TDS entry.

fields.name: amount
fields.purpose: The user's tax-payment detail, kept to compute and review tax.

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: TaxAssessment
purpose: Computed assessment summary per assessment year.

fields.name: gross_total_income
fields.purpose: The user's income summary, kept to compute and review tax.

name: TaxWizardAnswers
purpose: Per-AY answers to the ITR recommendation wizard.

name: CustomOptions
purpose: User-added 'Other' values for finite-set inputs (country/city/institution/…).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

name: People
purpose: Finance/estate contact hub: nominees, executors, attorneys, claims contacts. Bridged (not duplicated) to the shared person spine via myfinance#PersonFacet + entities dual-write — the integer id is the app-local relational key the estate tables join on.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: name
fields.purpose: Identify the contact for estate/emergency actions.

fields.name: phone
fields.purpose: Reach the contact in an emergency or estate claim.

fields.name: email
fields.purpose: Reach the contact in an emergency or estate claim.

fields.name: id_proof_ref
fields.purpose: Locate the person's identity proof for estate claims.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Estate-readiness note about this person.

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: Documents
purpose: Typed legal/financial document metadata (Will, PoA, policies, statements). Blobs live AES-GCM-sealed on disk, never here.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: title
fields.purpose: Identify the user's legal/financial document.

fields.name: file_name
fields.description: sealed blob file name under documents/ (null = metadata-only)

fields.name: encrypted
fields.description: 1 when the on-disk blob is AES-GCM sealed

fields.name: location_of_original
fields.purpose: Tell family where the physical original is kept.

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: Reminders
purpose: Manual + derived reminders (FD maturity, document expiry, SIP due, reviews).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: dedupe_key
fields.description: stable identity for a derived reminder

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: InsurancePolicies
purpose: Insurance policies for coverage-gap analysis and claims readiness.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: policy_no
fields.purpose: Identify the policy in a claim.

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: Holdings
purpose: Account↔person links: nominees, co-holders, Will beneficiaries (+ share).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: WillMeta
purpose: Single-row Will metadata (executor, registration, original's location).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: registration_details
fields.purpose: Locate the registered Will for probate.

fields.name: location_of_original
fields.purpose: Tell the executor where the Will original is kept.

name: IncapacityMeta
purpose: Single-row PoA + Advance Medical Directive metadata.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: amd_life_support
fields.purpose: The user's advance medical directive on life support.

fields.name: amd_resuscitation
fields.purpose: The user's advance medical directive on resuscitation.

name: AccessGrants
purpose: Progressive-access grants per person (tier 0/1/2) for estate disclosure.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: AuditLog
purpose: Append-only local audit of estate-access actions (check-ins, exports).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

name: LifeEvents
purpose: Life events (marriage, child, move) driving tailored review checklists.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: type
fields.purpose: Tailor estate-review checklists to the user's life events.

fields.name: sync_id
fields.description: stable cross-device identity for LAN sync (0021)

name: AppLaunches
purpose: Local-only usage telemetry: one row per app launch (drives on-device engagement tiers; never transmitted).

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

name: MasterOptions
purpose: OTA-pushed reference data (countries, cities, institutions, …) — public master rows.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

name: Partners
purpose: Curated professional directory (doctors/lawyers/CAs) pushed OTA; contact fields auto-fill the person form.

fields.name: id
fields.description: integer rowid key (preserved from the legacy DB)

fields.name: name
fields.purpose: Show the professional's name in the directory.

fields.name: phone
fields.purpose: Contact the professional.

fields.name: email
fields.purpose: Contact the professional.

name: SyncTombstones
purpose: Deletion log for LAN sync — lets a delete on one device propagate instead of resurrecting.

fields.name: table_name
fields.description: namespaced table the row was deleted from

fields.name: key
fields.description: sync identity of the deleted row

name: MigrationLedger
purpose: Ledger of the one-time legacy myfinance.db → suite.db consolidation (decisions 6/24): per-table copy/verify evidence rows plus the final 'migration' done marker. Append-only audit trail making the migration idempotent, resumable, and auditable.

fields.name: table_name
fields.description: legacy table copied (null for the completion marker)

fields.name: copied_rows
fields.description: rows copied into the suite table

fields.name: checksum
fields.description: FNV-1a hash of the ordered row sample (legacy side, verified equal on the suite side)

name: HealthProfile
purpose: Hospitalisation-ready medical facts for the ICE card — stored ONCE suite-wide on the common ICE card.

fields.name: display_name
fields.purpose: Name shown on the emergency card.

fields.name: blood_group
fields.purpose: Critical for emergency transfusion decisions.

fields.name: allergies
fields.purpose: Allergies first responders must know.

fields.name: conditions
fields.purpose: Conditions first responders must know.

fields.name: medications
fields.purpose: Current medications first responders must know.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Any other emergency note.

name: PersonFacet
purpose: Finance-specific facet data attached to a shared person (estate access tier, id-proof, notes).

fields.name: person_key
fields.description: shared person_key this facet attaches to

fields.name: id_proof_ref
fields.purpose: Locate the person's identity proof for estate claims.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Finance-side note about this person for estate readiness.

fields.name: local_person_id
fields.description: back-reference to the app-local myfinance_people.id for migration/reconciliation

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: ISO timestamp of the last edit

fields.name: source_app
fields.description: app id that last wrote this row
